stories.title: Multi-country reporting turnaround
stories.situation: Inconsistent multi-country reporting quality and deadline risk.
stories.task: Stabilize cadence and improve submission reliability.
stories.reflection: Quality gates plus predictable cadence outperform ad-hoc control.

stories.title: Audit readiness system
stories.situation: Need for consistent evidence quality before external audits.
stories.reflection: Early evidence discipline prevents last-minute fire drills.

stories.title: KPI governance alignment
stories.situation: KPI interpretation varied across teams and geographies.
results: Reliable KPI tracking across HQ + 4 offices + 15+ partners
stories.reflection: Shared definitions are foundational to reliable analytics.

stories.title: AI-enabled reporting workflow
stories.task: Reduce cycle time without lowering quality.
results: 25% faster report preparation with quality controls maintained
stories.reflection: Human-in-the-loop controls are mandatory in compliance-heavy workflows.

stories.title: Product launch operations
stories.task: Run predictable delivery and risk control.
results: 25+ deliverables on time over 24 months in prior PM role
stories.reflection: Execution rhythm and visibility reduce delivery variance.
